description_long: This is a military-style, six-wheeled cargo truck with a weathered olive drab exterior, featuring a flatbed rear for transporting goods or personnel. The cab is boxy with two side mirrors, a single front windshield divided into two panes, and a visible star insignia on the door, suggesting a military or utility purpose. The truck has a robust, utilitarian build with heavy-duty tires and a reinforced bumper, suitable for rugged urban or off-road environments. The cargo bed is open and flat, bordered by low metal sides, and shows signs of rust and wear, indicating extensive use. The front grille is prominent, with round headlights and a central emblem, while the rear is simple and functional, lacking any enclosure. The overall design prioritizes durability and practicality, making it ideal for transporting large or heavy loads in urban or industrial settings.
description: A weathered, olive drab six-wheeled military-style flatbed truck with a boxy cab and open cargo bed, designed for heavy-duty transport. Features include a star insignia, robust tires, and a utilitarian build.
description_view_0: Front view showing the divided windshield, prominent grille, round headlights, and side mirrors.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the star insignia on the door, the full length of the flatbed, and all three axles.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the open flatbed cargo area, low metal sides, and the back of the cab.
description_view_3: Right side view similar to the left, showing the cab, flatbed, and heavy-duty tires.
